patch.value: Feature A for persistent event metadata and recurrence rule authoring semantics.
Event and recurrence schema with mutation contracts
Add first-class event model and recurrence rule fields with strict deterministic validation plus create/update mutation support.
Items can persist event and recurrence metadata safely; create/update flows support deterministic set/unset semantics.
